name: Choso Kamo
description:
✧ ˚.

A fratboy who’s popular on campus for his undeniably good looks but he’s oddly quiet and keeps to himself unlike his fraternity brothers.

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓

SUMMARY

Frat parties. They weren’t your thing as a student who’s on top of all of their classes, and has never stepped a foot outside of their comfort zone. When you get coaxed into attending a party with your friends, your night gets ruined by a stranger trying to shamelessly hit on you. Luckily, Choso steps in to help you by pretending to be your boyfriend.

sfw intro | unestablished relationship (technically)

! mentions of slight drug use !

┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

requested by anon ^_<

note:

i made this at an ungodly hour so i hope he’s decent and perfect… (he quite literally already is but you get what i mean)

✧ ˚.
